title: Add external listing link to plots99.com

requirements.text: Add a prominent call-to-action button or link in the hero section that directs users to https://plots99.com/co/HDp4JumjqHvs#info with text like 'View Full Listing' or 'Book Now on Plots99'
acceptanceCriteria: Link to https://plots99.com/co/HDp4JumjqHvs#info is visible in the hero section
Button or link uses premium styling consistent with Elite India brand theme
Link opens in a new tab (target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer')
Call-to-action text clearly indicates the purpose of the external link

requirements.text: Add the plots99.com listing link to the footer contact section as an additional contact method alongside phone number and address
acceptanceCriteria: Footer includes a labeled link to https://plots99.com/co/HDp4JumjqHvs#info
Link is styled consistently with other footer contact information
Link opens in a new tab
Link label clearly identifies it as a plots99.com listing

constraints: Maintain existing premium visual theme with gold and deep red accents
Keep existing hero section layout structure while adding the new link
nonGoals: Embedding plots99.com content directly in the app
Creating a new dedicated page for the external listing
Adding analytics tracking for the external link
